dict.string: ZoneBuddy connects to your FTMS-compatible bike to display real-time power, cadence, and heart rate during workouts.
ZoneBuddy reads your health data to display workout history.
ZoneBuddy saves your cycling workouts to the Health app when connected to a bike.
ZoneBuddy needs access to your music library to play playlists during workouts.
ZoneBuddy uses the local network to relay heart rate data between your iPhone and iPad.
